response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with genuine systems-level experience, but he is a poor match for this specific role. The position requires deep hands-on C++/STL expertise for industrial automation, and his only professional C++ work was a roughly seven-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015; C++ does not even appear in his current skills list. His low-latency, high-throughput work was in DLang, his recent years are TypeScript/Node web product development, and he shows no exposure to MQTT, message brokers at industrial scale, IEC 62443, or secure development lifecycle practices that are core to this job.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) handling millions of requests per second
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and active mentoring through workshops and courses
Broad full-stack and DevOps range including Docker, Kubernetes, and event-driven platform architecture
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~7 months in 2014-2015) for a role centered on architecting C++/STL applications
No industrial automation, IoT/MQTT, or IEC 62443 / SDL security background
Recent career trajectory is web and product engineering in TypeScript/Node, moving away from the systems-level work this role demands

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and IEC 62443 security exposure
